title: salix × rehmanii
intro: Salix × rehmanii, also known as Rehmann's willow, is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Salix alba and Salix fragilis. The medicinal properties of Salix × rehmanii lie in its bark, which contains salicin, a compound similar to aspirin. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and analgesic properties, making it useful for relieving pain and reducing inflammation. Salix × rehmanii can be prepared as herbal tea, salves, or extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of conditions such as arthritis and other inflammatory diseases.
